touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Sage Flores at NovaCloud introducing AskElephant's conversation intelligence platform. No response received.
Follow-up email sent to Sage Flores highlighting ROI case studies for marketing agencies. No response received.
Cold call attempted to Sage Flores. Left voicemail mentioning call recording and coaching capabilities for sales teams. No callback received.

LinkedIn message sent to Sage Flores congratulating them on their new Head of Sales role and offering to share best practices for ramping sales teams. Sage responded expressing interest in learning more.

questions_asked.question: What specifically does your platform offer for onboarding new sales leaders?
questions_asked.answer: We provide call recording, AI-powered coaching insights, and performance analytics that help new leaders quickly understand team dynamics and coaching opportunities.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with proposed times for discovery call. Sage confirmed interest and shared that NovaCloud's sales team has been struggling with inconsistent call quality and coaching scalability. Scheduled discovery for next week.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we integrate with all major CRMs including Salesforce and HubSpot.

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: 34-minute discovery call with Sage Flores. Discussed NovaCloud's growth from 600 to 852 employees over past year and challenges scaling sales coaching. Sage mentioned they inherited a team with inconsistent processes and want to implement systematic coaching. Identified need for approximately 19 seats across sales and customer success teams. Sage is enthusiastic but acknowledged being new to the role (3 months in).

questions_asked.question: What are your biggest pain points with current sales coaching approach?
questions_asked.answer: We don't have one. It's ad-hoc. Managers listen to calls when they have time, but there's no consistency or data-driven approach.

questions_asked.question: Who else would be involved in evaluating a solution like this?
questions_asked.answer: I'd need buy-in from our CEO Owen Diaz, and our RevOps team handles vendor procurement.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we get this implemented? I'm trying to show impact in my first 90 days.
questions_asked.answer: Implementation typically takes 2-3 weeks from contract signature, including integrations and team training.

objections.objection: I'm still learning the ropes here and don't want to push for something that won't get approved.

next_steps: Send case study for similar-sized marketing agencies
Sage to brief Owen on initial interest

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with case study from similar marketing agency that achieved 23% improvement in win rates using AskElephant. Also included technical demo agenda and proposed times. Sage responded confirming Owen is supportive and requesting demo for next week.

36-minute technical evaluation call with Sage Flores. Demonstrated call recording interface, AI coaching insights, and analytics dashboard. Sage was impressed with the automated snippet generation and sentiment analysis features. Discussed integration with their HubSpot CRM and Zoom setup. Sage mentioned wanting to pilot with their core sales team first (19 users).

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the coaching scorecards to match our sales methodology?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, scorecards are fully customizable. We'll work with you during implementation to configure them.

questions_asked.question: What level of admin control do managers have versus reps?
questions_asked.answer: Managers have full visibility and can set coaching goals, while reps see their own performance and assigned coaching resources.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: I'd like to have something in place within the next 6-8 weeks. Need to move quickly to show progress in my role.

next_steps: Schedule follow-up demo focused on reporting for executives
Sage to loop in RevOps team

touches.ai_summary: 53-minute deep-dive technical evaluation with Sage Flores. Walked through executive reporting, custom dashboards, and ROI metrics. Discussed their use case for both call recording and ongoing coaching consultation services. Sage confirmed budget range and expressed urgency to implement before end of quarter. Mentioned that Luke from RevOps and Mia from Account Management will need to be involved in contracting.

questions_asked.question: Do you offer any consulting services to help us build our coaching program, or is it just the software?
questions_asked.answer: We have an Automations Plus Consulting package that includes quarterly strategy sessions and custom playbook development.

questions_asked.question: What does your approval process typically look like?
questions_asked.answer: Owen has final say, but Luke and Mia will need to review the contract and validate vendor requirements.

questions_asked.question: What's the pricing structure for the consulting add-on?
questions_asked.answer: It's bundled as a package. I'll have pricing ready for our next call based on 19 seats with consulting services.

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful to have Owen join a brief call to align on strategic value?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that would be great. He's supportive but I want him to hear the ROI case directly.

objections.objection: I need to make sure this doesn't overlap with tools we're already paying for. We have Gong for some call recording but it's not being used effectively.

next_steps: Schedule exec alignment call with Owen Diaz
Prepare pricing proposal for 19 seats with consulting
Sage to introduce Luke and Mia via email

touches.ai_summary: 26-minute executive meeting with Owen Diaz and Sage Flores. Owen expressed strong support for investing in sales infrastructure to support company growth. Discussed strategic importance of coaching consistency across the expanding team. Owen confirmed budget availability and asked about implementation timeline and expected ROI. Positive conversation with clear executive sponsorship.

questions_asked.question: What are your top priorities for the sales organization this year?
questions_asked.answer: Scaling efficiently. We're growing fast and I need to ensure our sales quality doesn't degrade as we hire. Sage is leading that charge.

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI have similar companies seen?
questions_asked.answer: Marketing agencies of your size typically see 15-25% improvement in win rates within the first six months, plus 30-40% reduction in new rep ramp time.

questions_asked.question: What happens after the first year? Is this a long-term partnership?
questions_asked.answer: Most clients expand usage over time. The initial investment builds the foundation, and we continue quarterly strategy sessions to evolve your coaching program.

next_steps: Sage to coordinate contract review with Luke and Mia

touches.ai_summary: 11-minute pricing call with Sage Flores. Presented proposal for $17,800 ACV covering 19 seats with Automations Plus Consulting package. Sage requested breakdown of consulting services included and asked about payment terms. Discussed standard annual contract with quarterly payments. Sage indicated pricing is within budget and will forward to procurement team.

questions_asked.question: What exactly is included in the consulting services?
questions_asked.answer: Four quarterly strategy sessions, custom playbook development, and ongoing best practice guidance from our customer success team.

questions_asked.question: Can we do monthly payments instead of quarterly?
questions_asked.answer: We can discuss payment terms. Let me check with our finance team and get back to you.

next_steps: Luke and Mia to review contract

touches.ai_summary: 22-minute negotiation call with Sage Flores. Discussed contract terms and confirmed monthly payment option. Sage requested minor adjustment to implementation timeline to align with their fiscal quarter end. Luke and Mia have completed vendor review and approved standard MSA. Sage confirmed Owen has given final approval and is ready to move forward with signature. Contract sent for execution.

questions_asked.question: Can we start implementation on May 1st instead of mid-April?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can adjust the start date to May 1st. I'll update the contract to reflect that.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else you need from us to finalize this?
questions_asked.answer: No, we're good to go. Luke and Mia signed off, Owen approved, just need to get the paperwork through.
